section_name: Jurisdiction, Administration, and Leasing of Land, Navigational Aids, or Facilities
text:
(a) The department has jurisdiction over and shall administer land given to the department.

(b) The department may:

(1) exercise jurisdiction over and administer navigational aids or facilities given to the state or to the department; and

(2) lease land, navigational aids, or facilities given to the state or to the department.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 21. Admin. of Aeronautics
##### § 21.060 — Jurisdiction, Administration, and Leasing of Land, Navigational Aids, or Facilities

(a) The department has jurisdiction over and shall administer land given to the department.

(b) The department may:

    (1) exercise jurisdiction over and administer navigational aids or facilities given to the state or to the department; and

    (2) lease land, navigational aids, or facilities given to the state or to the department.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The department has jurisdiction over and shall administer land given to the department.
exercise jurisdiction over and administer navigational aids or facilities given to the state or to the department; and
lease land, navigational aids, or facilities given to the state or to the department.
